title: AxeFactor
body:
![Axe Factor Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07eb7289fb4db26f24d9623e522f510fa9070d10_0.webp)

# Mobregon's 2k Texturepack

**The highly requested pack is finally released! It is loaded with tons of pvp features and even comes with custom items!**
Some of the features include:
- Low Fire
- Smaller Items
- Side Shield/Low Shield
- Custom Items and Armor
- Custom GUI
- Reduced Particles
- And More!!
